title: Concept
description: A cross-curriculum concept bridging equivalent topics across different syllabi

subdomain.description: More specific area within the domain (e.g., algebra, biology)

definition.description: Clear, curriculum-neutral definition of the concept

curricula.description: List of syllabus-topic pairs where this concept appears

syllabus.description: Syllabus ID where this concept is taught

topic.description: Topic ID within the syllabus that covers this concept

scope.description: How much of the concept this topic covers (e.g., introduction, full, advanced)
